rds.optiongroup.EngineName.Description: Specifies the name of the engine that this option group should be associated with.  Valid Values:   + `mariadb`+ `mysql`+ `oracle-ee`+ `oracle-se2`+ `oracle-se1`+ `oracle-se`+ `postgres`+ `sqlserver-ee`+ `sqlserver-se`+ `sqlserver-ex`+ `sqlserver-web`

rds.optiongroup.MajorEngineVersion.Description: Specifies the major version of the engine that this option group should be associated with.

rds.optiongroup.OptionConfigurations.Description: A list of options and the settings for each option.

rds.optiongroup.OptionGroupDescription.Description: The description of the option group.

rds.optiongroup.Tags.Description: Tags to assign to the option group.
